LanguageData.UB_SNS_Livestreamer.title: Livestreamer
LanguageData.UB_SNS_Livestreamer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years amassing a following livestreaming themselves on the internet. [PAWN_pronoun] went by the name "Vlamsauce", usually playing video game corruptions and making loud, odd noises for the chats enjoyment. Sadly, most of the games [PAWN_nameDef] played were 'babee gaems', and they never learned to 'schööt'.
